records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Miss Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't disappoint my fans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't disappoint my fans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't disappoint my fans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A professional's mindset is different, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A professional's mindset is different, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A professional's mindset is different, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Supporting roles?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Supporting roles?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Supporting roles?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could we get your comment about the series?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could we get your comment about the series?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could we get your comment about the series?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, well. I can't go into detail as it would be a spoiler...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, well. I can't go into detail as it would be a spoiler...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, well. I can't go into detail as it would be a spoiler...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a story about a detective and an assistant girl solving various mysteries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a story about a detective and an assistant girl solving various mysteries.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a story about a detective and an assistant girl solving various mysteries.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Grand Dimension Crevice Observation Post Main Entrance
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Grand Dimension Crevice Observation Post Main Entrance
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Grand Dimension Crevice Observation Post Main Entrance

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ho-oh, I see. The story already sounds so exciting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ho-oh, I see. The story already sounds so exciting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ho-oh, I see. The story already sounds so exciting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, our interview with Miss Swan had to end here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, our interview with Miss Swan had to end here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, our interview with Miss Swan had to end here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, our next news is about Charade's Gauntlet league.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, our next news is about Charade's Gauntlet league.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, our next news is about Charade's Gauntlet league.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The verdict of Wyler, who shot a teammate in the last Gauntlet match...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The verdict of Wyler, who shot a teammate in the last Gauntlet match...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The verdict of Wyler, who shot a teammate in the last Gauntlet match...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aah, I'm so jealous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aah, I'm so jealous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aah, I'm so jealous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, sir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, sir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, sir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard from a colleague who works in Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard from a colleague who works in Front Bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard from a colleague who works in Front Bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like Swan visited their observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice for a photoshoot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like Swan visited their observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice for a photoshoot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like Swan visited their observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice for a photoshoot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He bragged to me about how Swan signed his helmet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He bragged to me about how Swan signed his helmet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He bragged to me about how Swan signed his helmet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Isn't the observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice off-limits to civilians?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Isn't the observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice off-limits to civilians?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Isn't the observatory at the Grand Dimension Crevice off-limits to civilians?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was even a reality collapse that happened recently over there, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was even a reality collapse that happened recently over there, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was even a reality collapse that happened recently over there, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I really thought the world was ending at the time...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I really thought the world was ending at the time...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I really thought the world was ending at the time...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How am I supposed to know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How am I supposed to know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How am I supposed to know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates and hunters come and go over there all the time to collect their bounty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates and hunters come and go over there all the time to collect their bounty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates and hunters come and go over there all the time to collect their bounty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the restrictions over there are more lenient than Ground One, where a Corrupted Area is near the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the restrictions over there are more lenient than Ground One, where a Corrupted Area is near the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the restrictions over there are more lenient than Ground One, where a Corrupted Area is near the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or, maybe their VIP gave her permission to film.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or, maybe their VIP gave her permission to film.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or, maybe their VIP gave her permission to film.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Front Bay Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Front Bay Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Front Bay Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I heard Front Bay's VIP is a bit of a philanthropist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I heard Front Bay's VIP is a bit of a philanthropist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I heard Front Bay's VIP is a bit of a philanthropist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike our VIP who's haughty and picky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike our VIP who's haughty and picky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike our VIP who's haughty and picky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. Even looking at the recent reality collapse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. Even looking at the recent reality collapse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. Even looking at the recent reality collapse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is it our fault that a monster suddenly appeared from the Grand Dimension Crevice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is it our fault that a monster suddenly appeared from the Grand Dimension Crevice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is it our fault that a monster suddenly appeared from the Grand Dimension Crevice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... sir. Um...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... sir. Um...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... sir. Um...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What? Oh, I'm the bad guy here? But you also got a pay cut, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What? Oh, I'm the bad guy here? But you also got a pay cut, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What? Oh, I'm the bad guy here? But you also got a pay cut, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, did we summon that thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, did we summon that thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, did we summon that thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just did everything by the book, so why was she being hysterical to us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just did everything by the book, so why was she being hysterical to us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just did everything by the book, so why was she being hysterical to us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-erm, s-sir...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-erm, s-sir...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-erm, s-sir...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already dread being assigned to G-1, as incidents happen every second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already dread being assigned to G-1, as incidents happen every second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already dread being assigned to G-1, as incidents happen every second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, so what if she's a Senior? She's got to fix that attitude of hers if she wants to get married.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, so what if she's a Senior? She's got to fix that attitude of hers if she wants to get married.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, so what if she's a Senior? She's got to fix that attitude of hers if she wants to get married.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh yeah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh yeah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh yeah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I'm curious. So what about my attitude?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I'm curious. So what about my attitude?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I'm curious. So what about my attitude?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-m-m-m-ma'am...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-m-m-m-ma'am...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-m-m-m-ma'am...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I here? Do I need your permission to patrol around my city?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here? Do I need your permission to patrol around my city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here? Do I need your permission to patrol around my city?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's not that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's not that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's not that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that you were going to inform others of the decisions made in the Supreme Administrator meeting today...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that you were going to inform others of the decisions made in the Supreme Administrator meeting today...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that you were going to inform others of the decisions made in the Supreme Administrator meeting today...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ren959e Maalouf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ren959e Maalouf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ren959e Maalouf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Performance-oriented. Has a strong competitive spirit, while also having a strong need for recognition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Performance-oriented. Has a strong competitive spirit, while also having a strong need for recognition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Performance-oriented. Has a strong competitive spirit, while also having a strong need for recognition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hobbies include MMA. A grappler... Also a sign of high self-esteem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hobbies include MMA. A grappler... Also a sign of high self-esteem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hobbies include MMA. A grappler... Also a sign of high self-esteem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Favorite food is steak. Cooked rare. There are two restaurants she frequents.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Favorite food is steak. Cooked rare. There are two restaurants she frequents.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Favorite food is steak. Cooked rare. There are two restaurants she frequents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With her personality and career, she must have high standards for men.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With her personality and career, she must have high standards for men.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With her personality and career, she must have high standards for men.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She won't be interested in anyone around her or even her subordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She won't be interested in anyone around her or even her subordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She won't be interested in anyone around her or even her subordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the appropriate line to say for the role of Ren959e Maalouf here would be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the appropriate line to say for the role of Ren959e Maalouf here would be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the appropriate line to say for the role of Ren959e Maalouf here would be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me laugh, who are you to set my schedule?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me laugh, who are you to set my schedule?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh, who are you to set my schedule?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think you're some bigshot, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think you're some bigshot, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think you're some bigshot, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am? N-no, it's just that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am? N-no, it's just that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am? N-no, it's just that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Coffin Company's search and seizure is going smoothly. I'm just stopping by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Coffin Company's search and seizure is going smoothly. I'm just stopping by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Coffin Company's search and seizure is going smoothly. I'm just stopping by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha... I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha... I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha... I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got your report. There was a reality collapse while I was absent, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got your report. There was a reality collapse while I was absent, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got your report. There was a reality collapse while I was absent, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There should be a collapse prevention device made in the Old Administration days in Ground One's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There should be a collapse prevention device made in the Old Administration days in Ground One's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There should be a collapse prevention device made in the Old Administration days in Ground One's Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A prevention device?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A prevention device?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A prevention device?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I'm an engineer too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I'm an engineer too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I'm an engineer too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be able to determine the cause of it if we can analyze it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be able to determine the cause of it if we can analyze it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be able to determine the cause of it if we can analyze it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'll need to have a look around. Get ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'll need to have a look around. Get ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'll need to have a look around. Get ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Grand Dimension Crevice experiences frequent Counterside Effects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Grand Dimension Crevice experiences frequent Counterside Effects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Grand Dimension Crevice experiences frequent Counterside Effects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And due to the recent events, the alert level of the Grand Dimension Crevice has been raised by several levels.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And due to the recent events, the alert level of the Grand Dimension Crevice has been raised by several levels.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And due to the recent events, the alert level of the Grand Dimension Crevice has been raised by several levels.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't make me say it twice. I've already brought the Eternium shield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't make me say it twice. I've already brought the Eternium shield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me say it twice. I've already brought the Eternium shield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, we will act as your guards. Will that be okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, we will act as your guards. Will that be okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, we will act as your guards. Will that be okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This one seems to know his assignment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This one seems to know his assignment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This one seems to know his assignment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lead the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lead the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lead the way.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Area near the Grand Dimension Crevice <color=#ffd34c>CSE Lv. 2</color>
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Area near the Grand Dimension Crevice <color=#ffd34c>CSE Lv. 2</color>
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>ADC G-1</color> Area near the Grand Dimension Crevice <color=#ffd34c>CSE Lv. 2</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: From here, this area is constantly affected by Corruption rays flowing from the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From here, this area is constantly affected by Corruption rays flowing from the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From here, this area is constantly affected by Corruption rays flowing from the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please be prepared for the unexpected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please be prepared for the unexpected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please be prepared for the unexpected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's odd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's odd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's odd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: even so, it's only an expensive consumable item. Eventually, there will be budgetary issues when it comes to constantly deploying them.

records.m_Talk_FRA: even so, it's only an expensive consumable item. Eventually, there will be budgetary issues when it comes to constantly deploying them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, why are you telling her that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, why are you telling her that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, why are you telling her that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I understand what you're saying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I understand what you're saying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I understand what you're saying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that a C.O....?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that a C.O....?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that a C.O....?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! The sun in Front Bay is hot as ever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, we are meeting with Miss Swan who is in Front Bay for a photoshoot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Miss Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've returned to work after a long break. May I ask how you feel about it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's your first time away from the silver screen and doing a drama series, but the public's reaction is already so enthusiastic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, well. Since my background comes from doing stages, I think this will be like a challenge to myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It would mean that my story will not be a one-act play, but a serial drama.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha. The people normally know you as a movie star, but you were originally a stage actress.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I used to be nervous whenever I was up on stage, but the staff helped me so that I could act comfortably.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's surprising to hear. A genius like you getting nervous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone feels excited and nervous whenever they're on stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't disappoint my fans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't disappoint my fans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't disappoint my fans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I try my best to look elegant and graceful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A professional's mindset is different, I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A professional's mindset is different, I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A professional's mindset is different, I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, didn't you say you wrote the script?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I was involved in this work from start to finish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just the script, but I was also responsible for the producing, casting, location selecting, and supporting roles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Supporting roles?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Supporting roles?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Supporting roles?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I tend to prefer villainous roles over good ones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'm able to show my fans a more diverse acting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the story for this morning series is quite serious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it will be broadcast simultaneously all around the world, so I think it will feel different depending on where you watch it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we all put our 100 percent into the series, I don't think when it is aired will have a great significance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's a bold statement coming from a role model artist.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Could we get your comment about the series?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, well. I can't go into detail as it would be a spoiler...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, well. I can't go into detail as it would be a spoiler...

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a story about a detective and an assistant girl solving various mysteries.

root.m_Talk_DEU: There was even a reality collapse that happened recently over there, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was even a reality collapse that happened recently over there, right?

root.m_Talk_FRA: How am I supposed to know?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates and hunters come and go over there all the time to collect their bounty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the restrictions over there are more lenient than Ground One, where a Corrupted Area is near the Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the restrictions over there are more lenient than Ground One, where a Corrupted Area is near the Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike our VIP who's haughty and picky.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Why is it our fault that a monster suddenly appeared from the Grand Dimension Crevice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why is it our fault that a monster suddenly appeared from the Grand Dimension Crevice?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... sir. Um...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What? Oh, I'm the bad guy here? But you also got a pay cut, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What? Oh, I'm the bad guy here? But you also got a pay cut, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, did we summon that thing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, did we summon that thing?

root.m_Talk_DEU: We just did everything by the book, so why was she being hysterical to us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We just did everything by the book, so why was she being hysterical to us?

root.m_Talk_FRA: E-erm, s-sir...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: I already dread being assigned to G-1, as incidents happen every second.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, so what if she's a Senior? She's got to fix that attitude of hers if she wants to get married.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, so what if she's a Senior? She's got to fix that attitude of hers if she wants to get married.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you here...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here? Do I need your permission to patrol around my city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here? Do I need your permission to patrol around my city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's not that...

root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's not that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ground One Senior. Former Future-at-War senior researcher.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Recognized for her talents as an engineer since the age of fifteen. Joined the Administration after the fall of the Future-at-War project.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Assumed that her excessive desire to show off and obsessiveness for independence seemed to have formed during this time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Performance-oriented. Has a strong competitive spirit, while also having a strong need for recognition.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hobbies include MMA. A grappler... Also a sign of high self-esteem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Weak to compliments, but backfires if too obvious... Thinks that she is looked down on.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Favorite food is steak. Cooked rare. There are two restaurants she frequents.

root.m_Talk_DEU: With her personality and career, she must have high standards for men.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With her personality and career, she must have high standards for men.

root.m_Talk_FRA: She won't be interested in anyone around her or even her subordinates.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh, who are you to set my schedule?

root.m_Talk_FRA: From here, this area is constantly affected by Corruption rays flowing from the Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Grand Dimension Crevice has been currently stabilized and maintaining a CSE Level between 1 and 2...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But a Corrupted Area is still a Corrupted Area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please be prepared for the unexpected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please be prepared for the unexpected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please be prepared for the unexpected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's odd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's odd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's odd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't see any observation device from here. Is it okay to leave it unchecked like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Detection devices can't be deployed within a two-kilometer radius of the Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the level is low, an error occurs when it's exposed to Corruption rays for long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't there a few good products out on the market when it comes to an anti-Corruption device?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, the top-of-the-line equipment can last longer, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: even so, it's only an expensive consumable item. Eventually, there will be budgetary issues when it comes to constantly deploying them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: even so, it's only an expensive consumable item. Eventually, there will be budgetary issues when it comes to constantly deploying them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: even so, it's only an expensive consumable item. Eventually, there will be budgetary issues when it comes to constantly deploying them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, why are you telling her that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, why are you telling her that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, why are you telling her that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, we are patrolling the perimeter every hour due to the increase in the alert level.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I understand what you're saying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I understand what you're saying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I understand what you're saying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good work. I'll review the budget allocation once I return to City Management.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a little further to the collapse prevention device.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grr.... Grrrrrrr...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that a C.O....?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that a C.O....?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that a C.O....?
